task.dependencies:
DCs:
e1: clean(quarter_reporting_period: $quarter_reporting_period1, fiscal_year: $fiscal_year1, status: $status1, regional_office_code: $regional_office_code1, area_code: $area_code1, geographical_indicator_code: $geographical_indicator_code1, customer_category: $customer_category1, level_one_procedure: $level_one_procedure1, level_two_procedure: $level_two_procedure1, level_three_procedure: $level_three_procedure1, immediate_care_procedures: $immediate_care_procedures1, complimentary_bleeding_control: $complimentary_bleeding_control1, complimentary_bridge_maintenance: $complimentary_bridge_maintenance1, complimentary_denture_maintenance: $complimentary_denture_maintenance1, complimentary_prescription_allocation: $complimentary_prescription_allocation1, complimentary_suture_removal: $complimentary_suture_removal1, overall_total_value: $overall_total_value1), clean(quarter_reporting_period: $quarter_reporting_period2, fiscal_year: $fiscal_year2, status: $status2, regional_office_code: $regional_office_code2, area_code: $area_code2, geographical_indicator_code: $geographical_indicator_code2, customer_category: $customer_category2, level_one_procedure: $level_one_procedure2, level_two_procedure: $level_two_procedure2, level_three_procedure: $level_three_procedure2, immediate_care_procedures: $immediate_care_procedures2, complimentary_bleeding_control: $complimentary_bleeding_control2, complimentary_bridge_maintenance: $complimentary_bridge_maintenance2, complimentary_denture_maintenance: $complimentary_denture_maintenance2, complimentary_prescription_allocation: $complimentary_prescription_allocation2, complimentary_suture_removal: $complimentary_suture_removal2, overall_total_value: $overall_total_value2), $regional_office_code1 == $regional_office_code2, $geographical_indicator_code1 != $geographical_indicator_code2 -> #fail.
